name: UrTab
description: Your Tab, Elevated. Prayer times, Quran quotes with audio, calendar, live weather, interactive animated backgrounds.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; media-src 'self' blob: data: https://everyayah.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://a.espncdn.com; connect-src https://api.open-meteo.com https://api.bigdatacloud.net https://api.aladhan.com https://api.alquran.cloud https://site.api.espn.com; frame-src https://calendar.google.com https://outlook.live.com; form-action *;
